provenance.notes: Initial protocol constants extracted from the original MoonCatRescue Solidity source. Deployment address is intentionally not included here.

supply.notes: The source initializes totalSupply to 25,600, remainingCats to 25,600 - 256, and remainingGenesisCats to 256. A nearby source comment says '25,000 cats', but the numeric code is recorded here.

normalCatGeneration.summary: Normal rescue cat IDs are derived from keccak256(seed, searchSeed) when the first three bytes of the hash are zero; the catId uses the last four bytes plus one byte to indicate genesis status.

parserVerification.purpose: The contract source says this MD5 is used to verify mooncatparser.js, the cat image data generation JavaScript file.

todos: Verify deployed contract address separately before adding it to data/contracts.json.
Verify parser source and MD5 workflow before deriving image-generation or trait data.
Do not infer exact rescue-order ranges or category membership from these constants alone.
